question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/repository/RegisteredNodeRepository.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: findByRegisteredNodeIdBetweenAndDeletedIsFalseAndTypeIs()] Can an unprivileged external user call GET /api/v1/network/registered-nodes with no parameters to enumerate all active registered nodes and harvest their adminKey bytes from the response, given that AbstractRegisteredNode.adminKey is included in the serialized REST output, allowing the attacker to impersonate node operators and redirect transaction publishing to attacker-controlled infrastructure causing direct loss of funds?
